notes:
Attack alerts now break out every incoming wave - attacker, origin, exact troops and arrival time, on Discord and in the app.
Scout alerts: know the moment you are scouted, even though scouts never show as incoming.
Your fleet reliably relaunches after a crash or reboot: forced auto-launch plus a Start with Windows option.
A New version available button so you can update without restarting.
A branded home screen instead of a blank landing tab.
